Guide

# Release Notes

# Development

Commits (opens new window)

# v4.0.1 - January 6th, 2019

  • Fix main reference path - b826104

Commits (opens new window)

# v4.0.0 - January 5th, 2019

  • #94 (opens new window) - Missing "No newline at end of file" when comparing two texts that do not end in newlines (@federicotdn (opens new window))
  • #227 (opens new window) - Licence
  • #199 (opens new window) - Import statement for jsdiff
  • #159 (opens new window) - applyPatch affecting wrong line number with with new lines
  • #8 (opens new window) - A new state "replace"
  • Drop ie9 from karma targets - 79c31bd
  • Upgrade deps. Convert from webpack to rollup - 2c1a29c
  • Make ()[]"' as word boundaries between each other - f27b899
  • jsdiff: Replaced phantomJS by chrome - ec3114e
  • Add yarn.lock to .npmignore - 29466d8

Compatibility notes:

  • Bower and Component packages no longer supported

Commits (opens new window)

# v3.5.0 - March 4th, 2018

  • Omit redundant slice in join method of diffArrays - 1023590
  • Support patches with empty lines - fb0f208
  • Accept a custom JSON replacer function for JSON diffing - 69c7f0a
  • Optimize parch header parser - 2aec429
  • Fix typos - e89c832

Commits (opens new window)

# v3.4.0 - October 7th, 2017

  • #183 (opens new window) - Feature request: ability to specify a custom equality checker for diffArrays
  • #173 (opens new window) - Bug: diffArrays gives wrong result on array of booleans
  • #158 (opens new window) - diffArrays will not compare the empty string in array?
  • comparator for custom equality checks - 30e141e
  • count oldLines and newLines when there are conflicts - 53bf384
  • Fix: diffArrays can compare falsey items - 9e24284
  • Docs: Replace grunt with npm test - 00e2f94

Commits (opens new window)

# v3.3.1 - September 3rd, 2017

  • #141 (opens new window) - Cannot apply patch because my file delimiter is "/r/n" instead of "/n"
  • #192 (opens new window) - Fix: Bad merge when adding new files (#189)
  • correct spelling mistake - 21fa478

Commits (opens new window)

# v3.3.0 - July 5th, 2017

  • #114 (opens new window) - /patch/merge not exported
  • Gracefully accept invalid newStart in hunks, same as patch(1) does. - d8a3635
  • Use regex rather than starts/ends with for parsePatch - 6cab62c
  • Add browser flag - e64f674
  • refactor: simplified code a bit more - 8f8e0f2
  • refactor: simplified code a bit - b094a6f
  • fix: some corrections re ignoreCase option - 3c78fd0
  • ignoreCase option - 3cbfbb5
  • Sanitize filename while parsing patches - 2fe8129
  • Added better installation methods - aced50b
  • Simple export of functionality - 8690f31

Commits (opens new window)

# v3.2.0 - December 26th, 2016

  • #156 (opens new window) - Add undefinedReplacement option to diffJson (@ewnd9 (opens new window))
  • #154 (opens new window) - Add examples and images to .npmignore. (@wtgtybhertgeghgtwtg (opens new window))
  • #153 (opens new window) - feat(structuredPatch): Pass options to diffLines (@Kiougar (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v3.1.0 - November 27th, 2016

  • #146 (opens new window) - JsDiff.diffArrays to compare arrays (@wvanderdeijl (opens new window))
  • #144 (opens new window) - Split file using all possible line delimiter instead of hard-coded "/n" and join lines back using the original delimiters (@soulbeing (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v3.0.1 - October 9th, 2016

  • #139 (opens new window) - Make README.md look nicer in npmjs.com (@takenspc (opens new window))
  • #135 (opens new window) - parsePatch combines patches from multiple files into a single IUniDiff when there is no "Index" line (@ramya-rao-a (opens new window))
  • #124 (opens new window) - IE7/IE8 failure since 2.0.0 (@boneskull (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v3.0.0 - August 23rd, 2016

  • #130 (opens new window) - Add callback argument to applyPatches patched option (@piranna (opens new window))
  • #120 (opens new window) - Correctly handle file names containing spaces (@adius (opens new window))
  • #119 (opens new window) - Do single reflow (@wifiextender (opens new window))
  • #117 (opens new window) - Make more usable with long strings. (@abnbgist (opens new window))

Compatibility notes:

  • applyPatches patch callback now is async and requires the callback be called to continue operation

Commits (opens new window)

# v2.2.3 - May 31st, 2016

  • #118 (opens new window) - Add a fix for applying 0-length destination patches (@chaaz (opens new window))
  • #115 (opens new window) - Fixed grammar in README (@krizalys (opens new window))
  • #113 (opens new window) - fix typo (@vmazare (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v2.2.2 - March 13th, 2016

  • #102 (opens new window) - diffJson with dates, returns empty curly braces (@dr-dimitru (opens new window))
  • #97 (opens new window) - Whitespaces & diffWords (@faiwer (opens new window))
  • #92 (opens new window) - Fixes typo in the readme (@bg451 (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v2.2.1 - November 12th, 2015

  • #89 (opens new window) - add in display selector to readme (@FranDias (opens new window))
  • #88 (opens new window) - Split diffs based on file headers instead of 'Index:' metadata (@piranna (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v2.2.0 - October 29th, 2015

  • #80 (opens new window) - Fix a typo: applyPath -> applyPatch (@fluxxu (opens new window))
  • #83 (opens new window) - Add basic fuzzy matching to applyPatch (@piranna (opens new window)) Commits (opens new window)

# v2.2.0 - October 29th, 2015

  • #80 (opens new window) - Fix a typo: applyPath -> applyPatch (@fluxxu (opens new window))
  • #83 (opens new window) - Add basic fuzzy matching to applyPatch (@piranna (opens new window)) Commits (opens new window)

# v2.1.3 - September 30th, 2015

  • #78 (opens new window) - fix: error throwing when apply patch to empty string (@21paradox (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v2.1.2 - September 23rd, 2015

  • #76 (opens new window) - diff headers give error (@piranna (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v2.1.1 - September 9th, 2015

  • #73 (opens new window) - Is applyPatches() exposed in the API? (@davidparsson (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v2.1.0 - August 27th, 2015

  • #72 (opens new window) - Consider using options object API for flag permutations (@kpdecker (opens new window))
  • #70 (opens new window) - diffWords treats \n at the end as significant whitespace (@nesQuick (opens new window))
  • #69 (opens new window) - Missing count (@wfalkwallace (opens new window))
  • #68 (opens new window) - diffLines seems broken (@wfalkwallace (opens new window))
  • #60 (opens new window) - Support multiple diff hunks (@piranna (opens new window))
  • #54 (opens new window) - Feature Request: 3-way merge (@mog422 (opens new window))
  • #42 (opens new window) - Fuzz factor for applyPatch (@stuartpb (opens new window))
  • Move whitespace ignore out of equals method - 542063c
  • Include source maps in babel output - 7f7ab21
  • Merge diff/line and diff/patch implementations - 1597705
  • Drop map utility method - 1ddc939
  • Documentation for parsePatch and applyPatches - 27c4b77

Compatibility notes:

  • The undocumented ignoreWhitespace flag has been removed from the Diff equality check directly. This implementation may be copied to diff utilities if dependencies existed on this functionality.

Commits (opens new window)

# v2.0.2 - August 8th, 2015

  • #67 (opens new window) - cannot require from npm module in node (@commenthol (opens new window))
  • Convert to chai since we don’t support IE8 - a96bbad

Commits (opens new window)

# v2.0.1 - August 7th, 2015

  • Add release build at proper step - 57542fd

Commits (opens new window)

# v2.0.0 - August 7th, 2015

  • #66 (opens new window) - Add karma and sauce tests (@kpdecker (opens new window))
  • #65 (opens new window) - Create component repository for bower (@kpdecker (opens new window))
  • #64 (opens new window) - Automatically call removeEmpty for all tokenizer calls (@kpdecker (opens new window))
  • #62 (opens new window) - Allow access to structured object representation of patch data (@bittrance (opens new window))
  • #61 (opens new window) - Use svg instead of png to get better image quality (@PeterDaveHello (opens new window))
  • #29 (opens new window) - word tokenizer works only for 7 bit ascii (@plasmagunman (opens new window))

Compatibility notes:

  • this.removeEmpty is now called automatically for all instances. If this is not desired, this may be overridden on a per instance basis.
  • The library has been refactored to use some ES6 features. The external APIs should remain the same, but bower projects that directly referenced the repository will now have to point to the components/jsdiff (opens new window) repository.

Commits (opens new window)

# v1.4.0 - May 6th, 2015

  • #57 (opens new window) - createPatch -> applyPatch failed. (@mog422 (opens new window))
  • #56 (opens new window) - Two files patch (@rgeissert (opens new window))
  • #14 (opens new window) - Flip added and removed order? (@jakesandlund (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v1.3.2 - March 30th, 2015

  • #53 (opens new window) - Updated README.MD with Bower installation instructions (@ofbriggs (opens new window))
  • #49 (opens new window) - Cannot read property 'oldlines' of undefined (@nwtn (opens new window))
  • #44 (opens new window) - invalid-meta jsdiff is missing "main" entry in bower.json

Commits (opens new window)

# v1.3.1 - March 13th, 2015

  • #52 (opens new window) - Fix for #51 Wrong result of JsDiff.diffLines (@felicienfrancois (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

Commits (opens new window)

# v1.2.1 - December 26th, 2014

  • #41 (opens new window) - change condition of using node export system. (@ironhee (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v1.2.0 - November 29th, 2014

  • #37 (opens new window) - Add support for sentences. (@vmariano (opens new window))
  • #28 (opens new window) - Implemented diffJson (@papandreou (opens new window))
  • #27 (opens new window) - Slow to execute over diffs with a large number of changes (@termi (opens new window))
  • Allow for optional async diffing - 19385b9
  • Fix diffChars implementation - eaa44ed

Commits (opens new window)

# v1.1.0 - November 25th, 2014

  • #33 (opens new window) - AMD and global exports (@ovcharik (opens new window))
  • #32 (opens new window) - Add support for component (@vmariano (opens new window))
  • #31 (opens new window) - Don't rely on Array.prototype.map (@papandreou (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

# v1.0.8 - December 22nd, 2013

  • #24 (opens new window) - Handle windows newlines on non windows machines. (@benogle (opens new window))
  • #23 (opens new window) - Prettied up the API formatting a little, and added basic node and web examples (@airportyh (opens new window))

Commits (opens new window)

  • #22 (opens new window) - Added variant of WordDiff that doesn't ignore whitespace differences (@papandreou (opens new window)

  • Add 0.10 to travis tests - 243a526
